summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently with no shared canonical. Deterministic validation identified #73171 as security-sensitive, so that exact PR is quarantined with route_security. No close, merge, or fix actions are safe here: instant close, low-signal close, merge, and fix PR paths are disabled, and several PRs have maintainer-review gates, unresolved bot findings, failing proof/checks, dirty merge state, or active author/requested-review signal.

actions.reason: Maintainer/technical judgment is required for a useful focused PR that is dirty and not eligible for merge/fix automation in this job.
Keep open as an independent PR needing proof; no shared canonical or close path exists.
Maintainer/technical judgment is required because the PR has an unresolved P1 bot finding and stale-branch/dependency-guard evidence, but no fix path is allowed.
Maintainer judgment is required for a broad useful PR with unresolved review-bot findings; it is not a low-signal or duplicate close candidate.
Maintainer/technical judgment is required because the PR is useful and narrow but has an unresolved bot finding and cannot be repaired by this job.
This appears ready for maintainer review, but the job forbids merge and requires human technical judgment.
Keep open as independent follow-up work; proof/check state and maintainer judgment prevent close or merge.
Maintainer/technical judgment is required; the PR is narrow and active but has failing proof and cannot be merged or fixed by this job.
Human reviewer/maintainer judgment is required because a reviewer is requested and the technical value of test-only guardrails is explicitly out of scope for automated closeout.
Quarantine exact PR #73171 for central OpenClaw security handling; ProjectClownfish must not decide or mutate this security-sensitive item.
